arts.ttl: Matthijs de Ligt is starting to prove Rio Ferdinand wrong at Manchester United
arts.sum: Man United defender Matthijs de Ligt has been getting better and better in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Marcus Rashford dealt big blow as Barcelona boss makes decision
arts.sum: Manchester United are set for a busy end to the January transfer window, with Marcus Rashford expected to leave Old Trafford after falling out of favour under Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo 'rolled his eyes whenever one of his Manchester United team-mates spoke in the dressing room' - during his ill-fated second spell back at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo reportedly had a rather strained relationship with one of his team-mates during his second spell at Manchester United .

arts.ttl: Amorim 'doesn't know' if Rashford has played last Man Utd game
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim casts further doubt on Marcus Rashford's future after his exclusion from Sunday's squad for the FA Cup third-round victory over Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Bayindir shines as 10-man Man Utd beat Arsenal in Cup thriller
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Altay Bayindir shines as a 10-man Manchester United beat Arsenal on penalties in an FA Cup thriller at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Should Bayindir be Man Utd's first-choice goalkeeper?
arts.sum: Match of the Day's Gary Lineker, Alan Shearer, Micah Richards and Theo Walcott question if Altay Bayindir impressive performance in Manchester United's FA Cup third round win over Arsenal is enough to earn a spot as first-choice goalkeeper ahead of Andre Onana.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils linked with move for '£40m-rated' goalkeeper as possible Andre Onana replacement
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly interested in signing highly-rated young Parma goalkeeper Zion Suzuki, two years after missing out on the player.

arts.ttl: Amorim 'doesn't know' if Rashford has played last Man Utd game
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim casts further doubt on Marcus Rashford's future after his exclusion from Sunday's squad for the FA Cup third-round victory over Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Man Utd knock out Arsenal with 'five perfect penalties'
arts.sum: Watch the full penalty shootout as Manchester United score "five perfect penalties" to knock out Arsenal of the FA Cup and progress to the fourth round.

arts.ttl: Report: ‘Agent-driven’ – Man Utd winger Garnacho’s move to Napoli squashed
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho may not be heading to Napoli after all. Reports were widespread that the Argentine was inching close to a move to the Serie A club but now a report from the Daily Mail has put paid to that idea.
